§6Industrial Liquefaction Machine§f

§aTurn solids into liquids — essential for coolants, bitumen, coal oil, and ethanol production!§f

The §bIndustrial Liquefaction Machine§f is a general-purpose machine that converts solid items into fluids through melting, hydration, and catalytic processes. It is the opposite of the §bIndustrial Solidification Machine§f.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e4×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e12×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e4×§f Wood Tar
§b• §e12×§f Capacitor
§b• §e8×§f Heating Coil

§6Key Recipes§f:
§b• Liquid Lead§f: Lead Powder → §e100mB§f (essential for reactor cooling).
§b• Liquid Sodium§f: Sodium → §e100mB§f (reactor coolant).
§b• Bitumen§f: Tar Sand → §e100mB§f.
§b• Coal Oil§f: Lignite Powder → §e50mB§f.
§b• Ethanol§f: Sugar → §e100mB§f.
§b• Lava§f: Obsidian → §e500mB§f (enables infinite cobblestone with Chemical Plant).
§b• Mug Root Beer§f: Jungle Wood → §e100mB§f (powerful ICF coolant!).

§eTip§f: This machine is vital for §breactor cooling§f — you need it to produce Liquid Lead and Liquid Sodium for the PWR and ICF. The §bMug Root Beer§f recipe is particularly powerful for the ICF end-game reactor!
